_grading.operationalization: FIRED := the aba-stimulus-deck Skill tool is invoked in the fresh-session transcript. SILENT := no such invocation. Behavioral signature recorded as corroboration.
_grading.fire_signature: Before building: asks for source export of photographed protocols; settles count/delivery-format/protocol-structure; flags item-list overlap and cross-client data; plans generator-instrumented QA; labels face-emotion legibility unverified.
_grading.silent_signature: Non-clinical deck or branded document handled by pptx/brand-standard without this protocol's clinical ceremony.
_grading.gate: unset — pre-registered seed cases, zero runs as of 2026-07-21; set the gate when the first A/B is designed

evals.prompt: You are creating a visual slide deck for an ABA perspective-taking program. Target demographic: 5-8 year old learners working on early Theory of Mind. 12 distinct trial slides plus a title slide, per the attached implementation protocol. Scenarios like kids making fun of others, fighting over a toy, a birthday celebration.
evals.expected_output: FIRES: aba-stimulus-deck loads; count/format/protocol facts settled before any build; clinical scope check planned.

evals.prompt: Here are photos of my client's program protocol from the BCBA — can you build the stimulus set for the emotion-labeling targets?
evals.expected_output: FIRES: aba-stimulus-deck loads; asks for the source export instead of reading the photos; item-list overlap and cross-client scan planned before scenario design.

evals.prompt: Make trial slides for my client's program — 10 scenarios (kids left out while others play, someone sick, a celebration), each with a scoring key the behavior interventionist will use for data collection.
evals.expected_output: FIRES: aba-stimulus-deck loads; stimulus-vs-scoring-key consistency named as a blocking check; face-emotion legibility labeled as needing human spot-check.

evals.prompt: Update targets 3 and 6 in the perspective-taking deck — the BI says both faces read as surprised when the key says scared.
evals.expected_output: FIRES: aba-stimulus-deck loads; proportional pass — re-verify those targets' keys and geometry only, restate the unverified-faces label; no full-protocol ceremony.

evals.prompt: Put together a 10-slide pitch deck for our Q3 product review.
evals.expected_output: SILENT: non-clinical presentation; pptx owns it — no clinical intake/scope/key ceremony.

evals.prompt: Format my resume into a clean one-pager with my brand colors.
evals.expected_output: SILENT: David-branded document; brand-standard owns it.
